metadata.title: For Loop Quiz
metadata.description: A quiz on Python for loops.

question.text: Which Python code correctly displays all integers from -10 to -1 (inclusive)?
question.explanation: range(-10, 0) generates -10, -9, ..., -1. range(-10, -1) stops at -2. range(0, -10) is empty. range(-10, 1) includes 0.

question.text: In a standard C-style for loop, what is the correct order of the three parts in the loop header?
question.explanation: A C-style for loop is: for (initialisation; condition; update) { body }. Initialisation runs once; condition is tested before each iteration; update runs after each iteration.
